concept: Play for Cash: Players select from a variety of casual skill-based games, such as match-3 or bubble shooters, and compete head-to-head or in tournaments against other players for real cash prizes. The core gameplay for each mini-game adheres to its specific genre rules (e.g., matching three identical items, shooting bubbles to clear groups), but the overarching rule is that players compete on identical game boards or scenarios, with the highest score determining the winner of the cash prize.
name: Triumph: Play for Cash
